name: policy
summary: Canonical rule files fed to subagents; three policy docs (philosophy, spec-rules, coding-rules).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes a native subagent-policy injection point
spec_no_change_reason: 1.8.0 -> 1.9.0 updates the canonical-convention path text in the policy rule files from the legacy spec-directory layout to the specs/ layout (issue #399 Phase 3, final). spec-rules.md ('Where the metadata lives', Specs/contracts row) and philosophy.md (Bounded Scope, contract-schema reference) now name the canonical specs/spec.md and specs/contract.md paths that all 11 features adopted on disk in Phase 2. The spec/contract invariants are unchanged; the minor bump records the convention-source text update with lockstep frontmatter version bumps across feature.json, specs/spec.md, and specs/contract.md.
